definitions: 酶（在此语境下指帮助消化乳糖的酶）

examples.text: Babies have a lot of it in their system, so they can break down the milk-sugar lactose and digest milk easily. But the older we grow, the fewer lactase enzymes our body produces. Worldwide, about 65% of the population do not have the enzyme after infancy, which means they are not able to digest more than about 150 milliliters each day.
examples.explanation: 婴儿体内含有大量这种酶，因此能轻松分解乳糖并消化牛奶。但随着成长，人体产生的乳酶逐渐减少。全球约65%的人口在婴儿期后不再产生该酶，意味着他们每天无法消化超过约150毫升的牛奶。

source.text: 牛奶。白毒还是健康饮品？
